query:
SELECT season, viewName, CHAR_LENGTH(payload) as size
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season IN (2023, 2024, 2025)
ORDER BY season, viewName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yMVuFXFfyKno5zd.8bace71a6706 --database D7EDTbt5uXwnUBkJHewERh --execute 
SELECT season, viewName, CHAR_LENGTH(payload) as size
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season IN (2023, 2024, 2025)
ORDER BY season, viewName;
